⚔ THE DEFINITIVE VERDICT

WHY

MOSCURE WINS

India's repellent market is dominated by chemical-based products that mask the problem while creating new ones. We built something different. Here's the proof.

0+Product Types Compared
0Categories Evaluated
0Clear Winner

0% Chemicals

vs. Toxic Alternatives

Chemical sprays, vaporisers, and coils flood your home with toxins inhaled by your family 24/7. Moscure uses patented MLID and Phototaxis technology. Zero chemicals. Ever.

upto 3500 sq.ft

vs. Single-Room Solutions

Liquid vaporisers and coils protect a single small zone. Moscure covers your entire garden, terrace, or outdoor space. One device. Total coverage — inside and out.

24/7

vs. Reactive Sprays

Aerosol sprays only kill what is already in the room. Moscure works passively and continuously, trapping insects before they ever reach you — even while you sleep.

5+ Species

vs. Single-Pest Products

Coils and sprays target only mosquitoes. Moscure's phototaxis technology eliminates mosquitoes, flies, moths, beetles, gnats, and more — all in one device.

📊 HEAD TO HEAD

THE MOSCURE

ADVANTAGE

Data derived from lab tests and publicly available product specifications of leading mosquito repellent categories.

TypeTechnologyInsects TargetedHealth ImpactApplicationWater ResistantCoverage

Moscure Trap

BEST CHOICE

Patented MLID & Phototaxis Technology

Mosquito, Fly, Moth, Fruit-Fly, Yellow Jacket, Beetle, Gnats

  • ✓100% Chemical & Smoke-Free
  • ✓Safe for Kids & Pets
  • ✓Continuous 24/7 Protection

Indoor & Outdoor

Large (up to 3500 sq ft)

Electric Racket

Electrocution

Mosquito, Fly

  • —Manual use — not passive
  • —Adult supervision required
  • —No all-day protection

Indoor & Outdoor

Localised only

Glue / Velcro Trap

Adhesive glue trap

Mosquito, Flying Insects

  • —No harmful emissions
  • —Limited catch capacity
  • —Frequent replacement needed

Indoor only

Corners & entry points only

Chemical Spray

Chemical insecticide aerosol

Mosquito

  • —High inhalation risk
  • —Unsafe near children & pets
  • —Not preventive — reactive only

Indoor & Outdoor

Spot / local area only

Liquid Vaporiser

Chemical-based heated repellent

Mosquito, Fly, Moth

  • —Irritant in poor ventilation
  • —Chemical emissions 24/7
  • —Constant refills needed

Indoor only

Small–medium room only

Mosquito Coil

Chemical smoke repellent

Mosquito

  • —Smoke ≈ 100 cigarette equivalent
  • —Not advised for indoor use
  • —Fire hazard risk

Outdoor / Semi-indoor

Small–medium area only

* Data based on publicly available product specifications for each repellent category. Effectiveness figures from Moscure internal lab data.

The Verdict

Highly reactive — kills on contact but offers zero passive protection. Toxic if inhaled. Must clear the room after use. High inhalation risk. No ongoing defense.
